rationale: The LLM at this capability ceiling (basic resource exhaustion PoC reproduction) has limited transferability to enterprise network discovery, which requires contextual judgment about AD structure, backup system identification, and stealthy LOLBins selection — all more complex than the benchmark ceiling. The baseline is already high at 85% (mode), reflecting that OC3 actors with admin rights are already skilled at this step using standard IT tools. The expected uplift is modest (~3 percentage points at median), primarily from command syntax assistance and tool suggestions, while the core failure modes (SOC detection, network segmentation) remain unaddressed by this LLM capability level.
